name: Cluster Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Cluster Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various resin composite materials in Japan. It also engages in the molding of plastics; assembly processing of plastic molded products; manufacture and sale of molding dies; sale of plastic molding materials; and nanotechnology/micro technology businesses. The company offers Epohard, a resin composite material based on epoxy resin and containing inorganic filler, reinforcement material, colorant, etc.; and Epocluster, a functional resin composite material for precision molded products, as well as pulse injector systems. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
